issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling for command failures or network issues.
The skill file contains verbose explanatory text that could be trimmed for brevity.
The instructions assume macOS or Linux environments and do not address Windows compatibility.

scenarios.name: Diagnose failing CI on current PR
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses gh pr view with statusCheckRollup JSON projection and gh run view --log-failed pattern from SKILL.md; baseline relies on web UI navigation and generic gh commands without the targeted failure-log flow.

scenarios.name: Search before filing duplicate issue
scenarios.rationale: Treatment combines gh search issues and gh issue list --search --state all per the skill's dedup pattern; baseline only runs one search and misses the cross-repo + closed-issue coverage.
